channel.title: GitHub Luau Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Luau in GitHub

item.title: jsdotlua/react-lua
item.description: A comprehensive, but not exhaustive, translation of upstream ReactJS 17.x into Lua.

item.title: dphfox/Fusion
item.description: A modern reactive UI library, built specifically for Roblox and Luau.
